productDisplayName: Fila Men's Oxidised Navy Canvas Shoe
description: Made of canvas, the fila Oxidised shoes are designed to offer a comfortable running and walking experience coupled with style. Team this with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. The footwear comes with an extra pair of laces.Upper Canvas upper with stitch detailing on the heel with brand colours Fabric lining in contrast on the heel counter and below the tongue Brand logo appliquéd on the tongue Reinforced rubber casing surrounding the toe area to absorb shock Midsole EVA midsole for lightweight comfort and better shock absorption Cushioned EVA foam footbed for enhanced impact protection and comfort Outsole Carbon rubber outsole with lugs in the shape of the F Pivot point on the big toe mound for 180 degree of flexible movement shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierAvoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlight
